'''Tarkazza''' (meaning "mist ghost" in [[Shyriiwook/Legends|Shyriiwook]]<ref name="GCG">''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>) was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]], with a silver stripe down his back, who was the father of [[Katarra]]. He once took [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] beneath [[Rwookrrorro/Legends|Rwookrrorro]] by placing him in a [[quulaar]] on his back.

Tarkazza was one of the Wookiees who spearheaded the search for the Gran thief [[Kea Ra-Lan]] after she infiltrated Kashyyyk and stole ancient texts from the vaults of [[Neocomora]].<ref name="wbc10">{{JournalCite|10|Wanted by Cracken (Star Wars Adventure Journal)}}</ref>
